Moon: Moon is said to be malefic if it is in aspected or is associated
with malefic planets or is in Scorpio Rasi or is situated in 4th, 6tn. 8111, or
12111 hous.e.
To Increase the effects of a benefic Moon in the horoscope
Upayas to be done are as such :
1. Wear peart in ring finger set in silver tovching the finger or
wear pearl locket set in silver tooching the skin on Monday
after purifying it by washing it with gangajaf and mik and
p-erlorming puja. Pearl weight should be around or more
than three ratl. Mat1tta of it is : ·om Som SOmaya Namah:
2. Wear silver ring or bangle.
3. wear white dothes on Monday.
4. While leaving for some Important job. eat sugar and then
go.
S. On PurantruJsl (full Moon) day make kheer.
6. Keep idol of your God made in silver or morble at home.
